TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pratan, title = Pratan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pratan} }

S.FORM: Pratan Itiniay i Xiulin Cen no Hualien ko Pratan a niyaro', 256 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 797 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 747 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 50 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku83%, Amis3%, Tayal3%, roma4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: pratan itiniaj i xio~u~u…ĺin ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u pratan a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u**%, amis*%, taja…ĺ*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Pratan Itiniay i Xiulin Cen no Hualien ko Pratan a niyaro', 256 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 797 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 747 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 50 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku83%, Amis3%, Tayal3%, roma4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: pratan itiniaj i xio~u~u…ĺin ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u pratan a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u**%, amis*%, taja…ĺ*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
